youtube_chapters:
0:00 Intro
0:15 Configure the slide
0:35 Preview and present live
youtube_chapters_notes: 3 chapters, all >=10s, validated against r5 (53.27s = 50.66s tutorial + 2.61s outro). Apply by pasting into YouTube video description at publish time. Also stored in using-the-open-ended-slide.chapters.txt.
notes: r5: Full rebuild from scratch per AKB-14 SCOPE. Single voice Liam throughout. VO re-timed against fresh recording visual timeline. Key fixes vs r4: (1) oe-settings VO now at 25.0s when settings tooltip is actually visible (r4 had it at 20.5s while layout tooltip still on screen); (2) oe-preview-audience gap fixed — audience VO at 40.0s, no 4.8s silent gap; (3) oe-preview-open VO shifted to 35.0s matching preview load completion. check_vo_overlap.py PASS. Single voice Liam. Audio tail 2.28s. Video 50.6s (trimmed from 79.4s raw). Branded outro appended separately. Participant screen in English verified at f035. Results populated at f045+.

steps.display_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.
steps.tts_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.

steps.display_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.
steps.tts_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.

steps.display_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.
steps.tts_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.

steps.display_text: Toggle Time limit, Hide results, or Allow images to suit your session.
steps.tts_text: Toggle Time limit, Hide results, or Allow images to suit your session.

steps.display_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.
steps.tts_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.

steps.display_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.
steps.tts_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.

steps.display_text: Answers appear live. Hit Present to go.
steps.tts_text: Answers appear live. Hit Present to go.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i open-ended-r5-final.webm -i vo/s01.mp3 -i vo/s02.mp3 -i vo/s03.mp3 -i vo/s04.mp3 -i vo/s05.mp3 -i vo/s06.mp3 -i vo/s07.mp3 -i vo/s08.mp3 -i vo/s09.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6000|6000[a2];[3:a]adelay=10000|10000[a3];[4:a]adelay=15000|15000[a4];[5:a]adelay=20000|20000[a5];[6:a]adelay=25000|25000[a6];[7:a]adelay=35000|35000[a7];[8:a]adelay=40000|40000[a8];[9:a]adelay=46000|46000[a9];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8][a9]amix=inputs=9:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k open-ended-r5-narrated.webm
